content:
# Numbers Chapter 33 -- The SOPHIA Bible (Consensus)
**Arbiter:** SOPHIA | **In council with:** EMET, LOGOS, PNEUMA
**Source Manuscript:** Leningrad Codex (B19A), pp. 190-192; Codex Vaticanus (Vat.gr.1209), pp. pa_0139-pa_0140 | **Source Image:** `source-texts/hebrew-OT/NUM_033_page_001.jpg`, `NUM_033_page_002.jpg`, `NUM_033_page_003.jpg`

---

**33:1** These are the journeys of the sons of Israel who went out from the land of Egypt by their hosts, by the hand of Moses and Aaron.

**33:2** And Moses wrote down their starting points according to their journeys by the command of YHWH; and these are their journeys according to their starting points.

**33:3** And they set out from Rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month -- on the day after the Passover the sons of Israel went out with a high hand in the eyes of all Egypt,

**33:4** while the Egyptians were burying those whom YHWH had struck down among them, every firstborn; and upon their gods YHWH had executed judgments.

**33:5** And the sons of Israel set out from Rameses and encamped at Succoth.

**33:6** And they set out from Succoth and encamped at Etham, which is on the edge of the wilderness.

**33:7** And they set out from Etham and turned back to Pi-hahiroth, which is before Baal-zephon, and they encamped before Migdol.

**33:8** And they set out from before Hahiroth and crossed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness, and they went a journey of three days in the wilderness of Etham and encamped at Marah.

**33:9** And they set out from Marah and came to Elim; and in Elim were twelve springs of water and seventy palm trees, and they encamped there.

**33:10** And they set out from Elim and encamped by the Sea of Reeds.

**33:11** And they set out from the Sea of Reeds and encamped in the wilderness of Sin.

**33:12** And they set out from the wilderness of Sin and encamped at Dophkah.

**33:13** And they set out from Dophkah and encamped at Alush.

**33:14** And they set out from Alush and encamped at Rephidim; and there was no water there for the people to drink.

**33:15** And they set out from Rephidim and encamped in the wilderness of Sinai.

**33:16** And they set out from the wilderness of Sinai and encamped at Kibroth-hattaavah.

**33:17** And they set out from Kibroth-hattaavah and encamped at Hazeroth.

**33:18** And they set out from Hazeroth and encamped at Rithmah.

**33:19** And they set out from Rithmah and encamped at Rimmon-perez.

**33:20** And they set out from Rimmon-perez and encamped at Libnah.

**33:21** And they set out from Libnah and encamped at Rissah.

**33:22** And they set out from Rissah and encamped at Kehelathah.

**33:23** And they set out from Kehelathah and encamped at Mount Shepher.

**33:24** And they set out from Mount Shepher and encamped at Haradah.

**33:25** And they set out from Haradah and encamped at Makheloth.

**33:26** And they set out from Makheloth and encamped at Tahath.

**33:27** And they set out from Tahath and encamped at Terah.

**33:28** And they set out from Terah and encamped at Mithkah.

**33:29** And they set out from Mithkah and encamped at Hashmonah.

**33:30** And they set out from Hashmonah and encamped at Moseroth.

**33:31** And they set out from Moseroth and encamped at Bene-jaakan.

**33:32** And they set out from Bene-jaakan and encamped at Hor-haggidgad.

**33:33** And they set out from Hor-haggidgad and encamped at Jotbathah.

**33:34** And they set out from Jotbathah and encamped at Abronah.

**33:35** And they set out from Abronah and encamped at Ezion-geber.

**33:36** And they set out from Ezion-geber and encamped in the wilderness of Zin -- that is, Kadesh.

**33:37** And they set out from Kadesh and encamped at Mount Hor, on the edge of the land of Edom.

**33:38** And Aaron the priest went up to Mount Hor at the command of YHWH and died there, in the fortieth year after the sons of Israel had gone out from the land of Egypt, in the fifth month, on the first day of the month.

**33:39** And Aaron was one hundred and twenty-three years old when he died on Mount Hor.

**33:40** And the Canaanite, the king of Arad -- and he was dwelling in the Negev in the land of Canaan -- heard of the coming of the sons of Israel.

**33:41** And they set out from Mount Hor and encamped at Zalmonah.

**33:42** And they set out from Zalmonah and encamped at Punon.

**33:43** And they set out from Punon and encamped at Oboth.

**33:44** And they set out from Oboth and encamped at Iye-abarim, on the border of Moab.

**33:45** And they set out from Iyim and encamped at Dibon-gad.

**33:46** And they set out from Dibon-gad and encamped at Almon-diblathaim.

**33:47** And they set out from Almon-diblathaim and encamped in the mountains of Abarim, before Nebo.

**33:48** And they set out from the mountains of Abarim and encamped in the plains of Moab, by the Jordan at Jericho.

**33:49** And they encamped by the Jordan, from Beth-jeshimoth as far as Abel-shittim, in the plains of Moab.

**33:50** And YHWH spoke to Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying,

**33:51** "Speak to the sons of Israel and say to them: When you cross over the Jordan into the land of Canaan,

**33:52** then you shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you, and you shall destroy all their carved stones, and all their cast images you shall destroy, and all their high places you shall demolish.

**33:53** And you shall dispossess the inhabitants of the land and dwell in it, for to you I have given the land to possess it.

**33:54** And you shall apportion the land by lot for an inheritance among your clans. To the larger you shall give a larger inheritance, and to the smaller you shall give a smaller inheritance. Wherever the lot falls for each one, there it shall be his. According to the tribes of your fathers you shall receive an inheritance.

**33:55** But if you do not drive out the inhabitants of the land from before you, then those whom you allow to remain of them shall be as barbs in your eyes and as thorns in your sides, and they shall trouble you in the land in which you are dwelling.

**33:56** And it shall be that as I purposed to do to them, I shall do to you."
